doctors.bio: Dr. Sarah Jenkins has over 12 years of experience in cardiology. She specializes in preventative cardiology, heart failure management, and advanced echocardiography.
Dedicated and compassionate pediatrician focused on comprehensive child development, immunizations, and pediatric asthma care.
Specialist in nervous system disorders, chronic migraine therapy, and neuro-rehabilitation with 8 years of research and clinical practice.
Dr. Marcus Vance is an expert in reconstructive joint surgery, sports medicine, and minimally invasive orthopedics. He has dedicated over 15 years to restoring patient mobility.
Dr. Sophia Chen specializes in medical and cosmetic dermatology, acne treatment, and skin cancer screening. She is passionate about helping patients achieve healthy, radiant skin.
Dr. James Carter is an ophthalmic surgeon specializing in laser vision correction, advanced cataract surgery, and treatment of glaucoma and macular degeneration.

prescriptions.diagnosis: Mild Hypertension with elevated LDL Cholesterol
prescriptions.instructions: Avoid grapefruit juice. Maintain low-sodium diet and engage in moderate aerobic exercise 30 minutes daily. Please schedule a repeat biochemical screening in 8 weeks.
